title: Kerala polls: Satheesan challenges CPI(M) to explain Pinarayi’s photo with Sabarimala case accused Potti before targeting Sonia Gandhi
description: Satheesan’s response came when reporters pointed out that after Rahul Gandhi sang a line from a popular parody song about CPI(M) leaders’ reported role in Sabarimala gold theft, the Left party began a social media campaign making allegations against Sonia Gandhi
